criteria.label: Research Question
criteria.description: Clear, focused research question that guides the investigation. Demonstrates significance and originality.

criteria.label: Literature Review
criteria.description: Comprehensive review of relevant sources. Synthesizes existing research and identifies gaps.

criteria.label: Methodology
criteria.description: Appropriate research methods clearly described. Justifies approach and addresses limitations.

criteria.label: Analysis & Findings
criteria.description: Systematic analysis of data/information. Presents findings clearly with appropriate use of tables/figures.

criteria.label: Citations & Bibliography
criteria.description: Proper citation format throughout. Complete and accurate bibliography. Academic integrity.
